profile.subtitle: I do what matters. I move where it’s needed.
about.heading: Hi, I am Sergey
about.subtitle: Developer, athlete and photographer
about.bio: Hello! This is my personal page dedicated to my capabilities and interests. My path includes mobile application development, active sports and passion for photography. For any questions and suggestions, you can contact me in any of the ways presented.
about.contact.title: Contact me:
tech.heading: App Development
tech.subtitle: Android & Flutter development with a full-stack mindset — from Kotlin and Dart to backend APIs and Linux servers.
tech.milestones.title: Milestones
tech.milestone.2022.title: The Beginning
tech.milestone.2022.text: I started with websites, building them by hand with HTML/CSS. I briefly explored React. I earned my diploma from MIMO Academy in Fullstack Web Development.
tech.milestone.2023.title: Freelance
tech.milestone.2023.text: The start of my journey in Android development. I completed Google's course on Jetpack Compose without knowing Kotlin yet, learning it along the way. The first apps aren't shown here — they were for friends and kept score in board games instead of notebooks.
tech.milestone.2024.title: Growth
tech.milestone.2024.text: Diving deeper into development, completing Yandex's mobile development school. The stack expanded with XML, Clean Architecture, MVI. Dependency Injection (Koin, Dagger Hilt), async (Coroutines, Flow), local DBs (Room, SQL). Published on RuStore: Working Hours, Task Time, Feeling Diary, AppCradle Player. Taking freelance orders, releasing my own apps, starting to learn cross-platform development. Beginning to write backends with familiar tech: Ktor, Shelf.
tech.milestone.2026.title: Full-stack & Multiplatform
tech.milestone.2026.text: Working on large projects at MPEI, diving deeper into desktop and Linux servers. In-depth study of AI and using agents in development. Learning Rust to implement high-load modules in applications.
projects.title: Projects
projects.friends-activity.desc: Step counter with a rating system among your friends. Track your daily activity, compare results with friends, and stay motivated through friendly competition.
projects.working-hours.desc: The application allows you to set shift schedules with a specified frequency and calculate payment for them. Configure different shift types, track worked hours, and generate payment reports.
projects.task-time.desc: Pomodoro timer with focus and break intervals. The built-in task list helps you keep your focus on the most important things. Customize intervals to match your workflow.
projects.wot-calc.desc: Helps determine tank characteristics with different equipment setups. Automatic recalculation with new data. Compare configurations and find the optimal setup.
projects.feeling-diary.desc: Write down all the feelings you are experiencing at the moment. Keep a daily journal of your emotions, track mood patterns over time, and gain insights into your emotional wellbeing.
projects.appcradle-player.desc: Player for listening your own local tracks on the device. Create playlists, organize your music library, and enjoy high-quality audio playback with a clean, intuitive interface.
projects.money-everyday.desc: Your expenses on the screen. Without effort. An application for automatic accounting of personal finances and control of expenses using incoming notifications. Track spending categories, set budgets, and visualize your financial habits.
sport.heading: Sport
sport.subtitle: About my activity
sport.intro: Sport is an integral part of my life. Regular training helps me to stay in shape, develop discipline and find a balance between work and personal life. I am happy to help those who want to keep me company.
sport.running.title: Running
sport.running.desc: I run regularly and work on my overall endurance.
sport.strength.title: Strength training
sport.strength.desc: Gym training, working with your own weight, developing strength and muscle mass
sport.aikido.title: Aikido
sport.aikido.desc: I have been doing it for quite a long time and I would be glad to see those people who are also interested in it.
sport.physio.title: Physical therapy
sport.physio.desc: Massage, physiotherapy, exercises to correct deviations.
sport.certificates.title: Certification documents
photography.heading: Photography
photography.subtitle: My view of the world through the lens
photography.intro:
Photography for me is a way to capture moments that you want to remember. Noticing details and enjoying the current moment makes the hustle and bustle of the business world feel different.
I can help you capture what you yourself want to remember and relive.
donate.heading: Support
donate.subtitle: If you like my projects, you can support their development
donate.text: My apps are completely free and have no ads, so you can support me using the button below
